scenes.title: The Wall
scenes.biggestGap: One opening scale line used an unsourced exact number instead of a world-bound impression.

sceneContract.placeAnchor: Inner wall above the main gate, looking over Market Row and the chapel quarter.
sceneContract.materialAnchor: Warm parapet stone, soot in the joints, flour still ground into Jaina's skin seams.
sceneContract.povAnchor: Jaina reads the air as residue and the city as a failed magical answer too large for grain alone.
sceneContract.dialogueAnchor: No sustained dialogue; Sylvanas's eventual hand and roughened voice must arrive through smoke, cloth, and stone.
sceneContract.exitAnchor: The hand on Jaina's shoulder and the turn toward the soot-streaked watch stair pull her out of abstraction.

scenes.title: The Diagnosis
scenes.biggestGap: The three-way mirror stays grounded only if every thematic turn remains pinned to stone, smoke, chalk, and the city below.

sceneContract.placeAnchor: The same wall, with the city still working below it as the thought's physical pressure source.
sceneContract.materialAnchor: Stone under her hands, smoke in her throat, remembered chalk from Kel'Thuzad's room.
sceneContract.povAnchor: Jaina's fear is methodological: she recognizes the shape of certainty outrunning friction.
sceneContract.dialogueAnchor: No dialogue run; the scene must stay bodily through touch, throat, breath, and remembered objects.
sceneContract.exitAnchor: The renewed bread-taste wrongness and the stopping bells push her out of thought and back into the wall.

scenes.title: The Anchor
scenes.biggestGap: The practical Farstrider competence and re-formed riding geometry need to stay visibly physical rather than symbolic.

sceneContract.placeAnchor: The soot-streaked watch stair and the yard pocket Cyndia has carved out below it.
sceneContract.materialAnchor: Gauntlet pressure, worn stair centers, water skin leather, checked tack.
sceneContract.povAnchor: Jaina notices mercy as something operational: a back to follow, a line to slot back into, a missing pause.
sceneContract.dialogueAnchor: Sylvanas's route-order and Cyndia's silent readiness must stay attached to touch, gear, and horsework.
sceneContract.exitAnchor: The three-rider formation on the south road makes the weld visible in motion.

scenes.title: The Road and the Pivot
scenes.biggestGap: The Antonidas call and northward pivot only work if the road, stone warmth, relay procedure, and salt-wind turn stay physically live.

sceneContract.placeAnchor: The south road running away from Stratholme while the north-east coast begins to announce itself through colder air.
sceneContract.materialAnchor: Warm sending-stone, reins, notebook paper, dispatch tube, relay horse foam.
sceneContract.povAnchor: Jaina keeps reducing atrocity into usable mechanism even while home and pursuit pull against each other.
sceneContract.dialogueAnchor: The Antonidas exchange must stay pinned to saddle movement, stone warmth, and road interruption; the relay exchange must stay pinned to horseflesh and Farstrider procedure.
sceneContract.exitAnchor: South remains underhoof while north enters as salt wind, dispatch fact, and the unspoken shared question.
